input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.3.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.3.1
            TITLE: dimensions

            CONTENT:
            rule F.3.1: Dimensions
F.3.1 Dimensions 
Diameter and Wall Thickness values provided in this Section F.3 are based on dimensions for 
commonly available tubing.
Formula SAE® Rules 2024 © 2023 SAE International  Page 26 of 140   
Version 1.0   1 Sep 2023

final_answer: Dimensions Diameter and Wall Thickness values provided in this Section F.3 are based on dimensions for commonly available tubing.
